issue.summary: PIX payment shows failure but customer may have been charged
issue.description: Customer saw payment failed but ledger suggests capture succeeded.
issue.expected_behavior: The UI should confirm a successful payment exactly once.
issue.actual_behavior: The UI showed failure after authorization.

issue.summary: Checkout warning triggered on missing field before authorization
issue.description: Client validation blocked submit before any payment event was sent.
issue.expected_behavior: Form should block submit and highlight the required field.
issue.actual_behavior: A warning banner was shown and no backend transaction was created.
